title: Jamaican Sweet Potato Casserole
description: A sweet and savory twist on a classic casserole, featuring the warm flavors of Jamaica.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine cubed sweet potatoes, Jamaican jerk seasoning, brown sugar, granulated sugar, and a pinch of salt. Mix well.
In a separate bowl, combine melted butter, heavy cream, and vanilla extract. Mix well.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the sweet potatoes are tender.
Remove from the oven and top with mini marshmallows.
Return to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes or until the marshmallows are golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
